ayahs.translation: By the dawn
And [by] ten nights[1913]
And [by] the even [number] and the odd
And [by] the night when it passes,

ayahs.arabic: هَلْ فِى ذَٰلِكَ قَسَمٌ لِّذِى حِجْرٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: هَلْ فِي ذَٰلِكَ قَسَمٌ لِّذِي حِجْرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Hal fee thalika qasamun lithee hijr
ayahs.translation: Is there [not] in [all] that an oath [sufficient] for one of perception?[1914]

ayahs.arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِعَادٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِعَادٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Alam tara kayfa faAAala rabbuka biAAad
ayahs.translation: Have you not considered how your Lord dealt with ʿAad -
[With] Iram[1915] - who had lofty pillars,[1916]

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّتِى لَمْ يُخْلَقْ مِثْلُهَا فِى ٱلْبِلَـٰدِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: الَّتِي لَمْ يُخْلَقْ مِثْلُهَا فِي الْبِلَادِ
ayahs.transliteration: Allatee lam yukhlaq mithluha fee albilad
ayahs.translation: The likes of whom had never been created in the land?
And [with] Thamūd, who carved out the rocks in the valley?
And [with] Pharaoh, owner of the stakes?[1917]
[All of] whom oppressed within the lands
And increased therein the corruption.
So your Lord poured upon them a scourge of punishment.
Indeed, your Lord is in observation.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَمَّا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَأَكْرَمَهُۥ وَنَعَّمَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَكْرَمَنِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَأَمَّا الْإِنسَانُ إِذَا مَا ابْتَلَاهُ رَبُّهُ فَأَكْرَمَهُ وَنَعَّمَهُ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّي أَكْرَمَنِ
ayahs.transliteration: Faamma al-insanu itha maibtalahu rabbuhu faakramahu wanaAAAAamahu fayaqoolu rabbeeakraman
ayahs.translation: And as for man, when his Lord tries him and [thus] is generous to him and favors him, he says, "My Lord has honored me."[1918]

ayahs.arabic: وَأَمَّآ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ فَقَدَرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَهَـٰنَنِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَأَمَّا إِذَا مَا ابْتَلَاهُ فَقَدَرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقَهُ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّي أَهَانَنِ
ayahs.transliteration: Waamma itha ma ibtalahufaqadara AAalayhi rizqahu fayaqoolu rabbee ahanan
ayahs.translation: But when He tries him and restricts his provision, he says, "My Lord has humiliated me."
No![1919] But you do not honor the orphan
And you do not encourage one another to feed the poor.
And you consume inheritance, devouring [it] altogether,[1920]
And you love wealth with immense love.

ayahs.arabic: كَلَّآ إِذَا دُكَّتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ دَكًّا دَكًّا
ayahs.simpleArabic: كَلَّا إِذَا دُكَّتِ الْأَرْضُ دَكًّا دَكًّا
ayahs.translation: No! When the earth has been leveled - pounded and crushed
And your Lord has come[1921] and the angels, rank upon rank,

ayahs.arabic: وَجِا۟ىٓءَ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بِجَهَنَّمَ ۚ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ وَأَنَّىٰ لَهُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَجِيءَ يَوْمَئِذٍ بِجَهَنَّمَ ۚ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَذَكَّرُ الْإِنسَانُ وَأَنَّىٰ لَهُ الذِّكْرَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Wajee-a yawma-ithin bijahannamayawma-ithin yatathakkaru al-insanu waannalahu aththikra
ayahs.translation: And brought [within view], that Day, is Hell - that Day, man will remember, but how [i.e., what good] to him will be the remembrance?
He will say, "Oh, I wish I had sent ahead [some good] for my life."[1922]
So on that Day, none will punish [as severely] as His punishment,
And none will bind [as severely] as His binding [of the evildoers].
[To the righteous it will be said], "O reassured soul,
Return to your Lord, well-pleased and pleasing [to Him],
And enter among My [righteous] servants
And enter My Paradise."
